name: SpongeBob SquarePants: Battle for Bikini Bottom - Rehydrated

install_dir_names: SpongeBob SquarePants Battle for Bikini Bottom - Rehydrated

post_apply_message: STUB RECIPE — SpongeBob BFBB Rehydrated is here so scan/reconciliation know about it, but no fixes are actually applied yet. Intro-skip filenames are undocumented on PCGamingWiki; when you're on the Deck run: ls 'Pineapple/Content/Movies/' inside the game folder and paste the output back, and I'll turn this into a real intro-skip recipe. Nothing else to do here for now.
notes: Stub. UE4 game, internal name 'Pineapple' (Purple Lamp Studios/THQ Nordic). PCGW's Essential Improvements section is bare — no documented intro-skip filenames as of 2026-07-07. Common UE4 layout would put intros at Pineapple/Content/Movies/*.mp4 or *.bik but I refuse to guess. Tony to `ls` and share, then this becomes a normal remove_files recipe.
